channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Water leaking from under road surface, 4th July
item.description:
In front of lamp post 4711 there is a patch of road next to the drain that is permanently wet and leaking water so much so that Algae has grown so it’s been going on for awhile. I’m not sure whether it’s linked to the drain being blocked or not it might be a Thames water issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Cintra Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded fridge-freezer will full contents and pot of paint with spilled paint., 4th July
item.description:
This fridge-freezer appeared here on Thursday 2nd July , with all its contents. Whoever put it there didn't bother to throw away the food separately as general litter. Foul smell is coming from it - it's a health hazard for everyone living here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on corner of Winns Common by roadworks, 4th July
item.description:
As above
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kings Highway, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and lack of street cleaning for months, 4th July
item.description:
The presence of discarded Christmas trees in and amongst the mounting piles of rubbish, gives an indication of the length of time that this stretch of Blackheath Hill (leading up hill from number 87) has been left unattended by a street-cleaning team.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dartmouth Hill, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 95 Chatsworth Road, 4th July
item.description:
Baby fox found dead on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Dead animal on street

item.title: Boxes and textile waste dumped on the road, 4th July
item.description:
It’s been there for several weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Howletts Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden furniture, 4th July
item.description:
Flytipped on our street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raymond Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on royal circus, 4th July
item.description:
Flytipping on royal circus between broxholm road and portal close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Circus, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 X rolled up mattresses dumped, 4th July
item.description:
Mattresses dumped on grass corner of Sudbury crescent and keedonwood.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudbury Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic island sign knocked down, 4th July
item.description:
The traffic island sign has been knocked down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Parkhill Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus diversion, 4th July
item.description:
Buses on diversion from frazer Rd Erith 99 180 down carlton Road Erith Cars parked opposite my house causing bus route problems. No one gives way Buses lorrys and cars drive down the pavement to carry on there journey.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 Voi’s on Datchelor Place, a no ebike zone, 4th July
item.description:
These 4 bikes have been badly damaged . Users should not be leaving them here. Take these very seriously damaged bikes away now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Datchelor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rough homeless sleeping, 4th July
item.description:
I believe a local resident with mental illness who actually has a house to live in has set up camp outside the Home and created the shelter on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Clarence Avenue, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins being emptied and ripped open, 4th July
item.description:
All the bins bags from my bins have been removed and ripped open leaving a huge amount of waste scattered across my front path. This has happened on numerous occasions, the above photos are from 3/6/26, Colvestone crescent.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colvestone Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on streets, 4th July
item.description:
Constant litter in street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Clarence Avenue, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road works are preventing observation when turning out of annandale, 4th July
item.description:
Fenced of materials are up to the kerb preventing observation when turning out of annandale road. Very dangerous situation
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Annandale Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign that displays parking restrictions knocked down by drunk drivers coming from George staples, 4th July
item.description:
Sign post knocked down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 280, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rockcliffe gardens is a complete mess, 4th July
item.description:
What is the point on previously spending thousands of pounds upgrading rockcliffe gardens only to let it fall back into disrepair.It is a mess and needs repairs all over.IT WOULD HELP IF YOU LOCKED THE PARK AT NIGHT. Anyone going into the park after 11pm is up to no good.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kings Highway, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Erskine road next to white block of flats, 4th July
item.description:
Panel detached from light, unsafe with electrics exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erskine Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eastern end of the avenue, 4th July
item.description:
Litter - outside Mapes House/Athelstan gardens Whole street needs sweeping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
